hero.headline: See Wild Dolphins & Manatees on Florida’s Beautiful Indian River Lagoon
hero.subheadline: Relax on a comfortable pontoon boat with Captain Bob for a family-friendly 2-hour wildlife tour in Melbourne, Florida.

booking.schedule: Tuesday through Saturday at 10:30 AM, plus 1:00 PM tours Friday and Saturday. Private and sunset tours available.
booking.privatePrice: $299 private tours for up to 10 guests

photos.title: Bottlenose dolphin on the Indian River

review: Captain Bob's knowledge of the local wildlife and history of the area is presented in a low-key and humorous way. The pontoon boat is comfortable with a smooth ride. We had a close up view of several dolphins and even saw a baby dolphin! Like a mini getaway on the water - very refreshing. Would highly recommend!
